title: Mindfulness on the Go (Shambhala Pocket Classic)
author: Jan Chozen Bays
description: Mindfulness practices anyone can do anytime. If you’ve heard about the many benefits of mindfulness practice but think you don’t have time for it in your busy life, prepare to be proven delightfully wrong.
